name: golang-github-mattn-go-sqlite3-dev
title: golang-github-mattn-go-sqlite3-dev
summary: sqlite3 driver for go that using database/sql
description:
sqlite3 driver for go that using database/sql
SQLite3 driver conforming to the built-in database/sql interface.
Currently, go-sqlite3 support following data types: null, integer,
float, blob, text and timestamp/datetime.
